brief_justification: Correct answer (kitchen drawer) with valid theory-of-mind reasoning; Multi-level analysis tracking object locations, witness states, and belief updates through timeline; Some self-monitoring via calibration context and careful attention to who observed what; Basic verification through timeline table but no counterfactual check; Acknowledges the belief-state vs actual-location distinction but doesn't explicitly flag uncertainty; Implicitly considers the counter location (actual) vs drawer (believed) but doesn't systematically evaluate other alternatives; Full derivation trail with timeline table showing every move and witness, fully reproducible
